title: Objective
content: To join a dynamic Security Operations Center (SOC) as an analyst, where I can leverage my skills in real-time threat monitoring, vulnerability scanning, and incident response to detect and mitigate potential security risks, ensuring the organization's infrastructure remains secure.

To leverage my expertise in system configuration, user management, and security hardening to support corporate IT environments, ensuring end-users have secure and reliable access to necessary resources.

To leverage my expertise in cryptography, penetration testing, and secure system design to build robust security frameworks that protect organizational assets. I aim to contribute to proactive threat mitigation and ensure the integrity of critical infrastructure.

To utilize my expertise in penetration testing, ethical hacking, and security assessments to identify and remediate vulnerabilities, ensuring comprehensive protection for enterprise systems against cyber threats.

To apply my technical skills and hands-on experience with cybersecurity tools and methodologies in a challenging analyst role, contributing to organizational security through proactive risk mitigation and incident handling.

To utilize my knowledge of encryption protocols, secure software development, and penetration testing to design, implement, and maintain applications and systems with a focus on minimizing vulnerabilities and maximizing resilience.

To apply my skills in penetration testing, vulnerability assessment, and cryptographic methods to anticipate and mitigate threats, ensuring enterprise systems are prepared for emerging cybersecurity challenges.

To secure a position as an IT Systems Administrator, maintaining and optimizing enterprise systems and infrastructure while ensuring reliable and secure network operations across on-premises and cloud environments.
To contribute as an IT Systems Administrator by implementing automation scripts, managing cloud resources, and ensuring seamless integration of new technologies to drive operational efficiency.

title: Education
content: Northwestern University Cybersecurity Program: Graduated June 2024
B.S. in Applied and Computational Mathematics; Minors in Computer Science and Physics.

content.subtitle: Mathnasium – Mathematics Instructor
details: Enhanced security of iPads used in instruction by implementing guided access controls.

content.subtitle: DePaul University Math Department – Student Researcher
details: Developed Python tools for research, focusing on preventing rounding errors in fraction representations.
Advanced the understanding of the Frobenius coin problem and computed symmetry in large data sets.

title: Technical Projects
content: Built a Shuffle + TheHive SOAR lab on Docker Swarm; designed playbooks that triage SOC alerts via parallel URLhaus/AbuseIPDB enrichment, threshold-based verdict routing, and automated case creation through REST APIs.
Deployed Cloudflare Zero Trust tunnels across multi-site infrastructure with per-service Google OAuth policies, exposing self-hosted dashboards and applications without inbound firewall ports or VPN.
Designed a Claude Code multi-agent security review system with least-privilege tool access and structured output templates, automating OWASP Top 10 scanning and CWE classification.
Engineered a Python CLI that integrates Claude and OpenRouter APIs to generate tailored resume variants from structured JSON, using prompt engineering to format output for specific roles.

Architected a DevSecOps CI/CD pipeline in GitHub Actions for a Flask app, integrating TruffleHog, Semgrep, Trivy, and Checkov to automate secret detection, SAST, dependency/container, and IaC scanning.
Configured a Splunk SIEM environment with custom correlation searches and dashboards, ingesting logs from Linux and Windows endpoints to detect and triage suspicious activity.

Constructed a network security monitoring lab with Snort and Security Onion, authoring custom Snort rules and pivoting through Kibana dashboards to triage alerts and reconstruct attack timelines from full packet captures.
Developed Python scripts wrapping Nmap to automate recurring network scans across lab segments, parsing results into prioritized remediation lists.
Conducted network penetration tests in lab environments using Metasploit, Nmap, and Wireshark to enumerate services, exploit known CVEs, and document attack paths to domain compromise.

Executed a multi-stage penetration test spanning web, Linux, and Active Directory tiers, exploiting OWASP Top 10 flaws and Linux CVEs, then performing Mimikatz credential dumps and DCSync to extract domain NTLM hashes.
Stood up an offline Have I Been Pwned "Pwned Passwords" database in Docker, enabling air-gapped lookups against 850M+ compromised password hashes without external API calls.

Performed web application penetration tests using Burp Suite against OWASP Top 10 targets, with emphasis on authentication flaws and credential brute-forcing alongside SQL injection and XSS exploration.
Provisioned an Azure virtual network with segmented subnets, deploying hardened Linux VMs and configuring NSG rules and key-based SSH for secure remote administration.
Deployed a containerized web application on Azure App Service with Key Vault-managed TLS; fronted it with Azure Front Door and custom WAF rule sets to mitigate OWASP Top 10 attacks.
Hardened Docker container deployments with non-root users, read-only filesystems, and host-level UFW rules to reduce attack surface on self-hosted services.
Built a secure file-sharing application using RSA for key exchange and AES for symmetric encryption, protecting confidentiality during client-server data transfer.
Implemented TLS for a self-hosted web application with Let's Encrypt certificates and automated renewal via certbot, enforcing HSTS and redirecting HTTP traffic to HTTPS.
Authored host-level firewall policies with UFW and firewalld on Linux servers, enforcing default-deny ingress rules and permitting only required services.
Automated Linux user provisioning and configuration management across multiple web hosts with Ansible playbooks, enforcing consistent account policies and permissions via SSH.

Performed an iOS digital forensics investigation in Autopsy, recovering deleted SMS and email artifacts, extracting GPS and Wi-Fi geolocation data, and documenting chain of custody for a court-ready report.

title: Core Competencies
content: Cloud Infrastructure Security (Azure, AWS, OCI, Linode)
